Name: OakheartTimber
Description: Dense heartwood from the threshold groves. The first thing every survivor learns to harvest.

Name: Riverstone
Description: Smooth stone sung round by the realm's cold rivers.

Name: Palefiber
Description: Ghost-white plant fiber that never quite stops swaying.

Name: Gloomcap
Description: A fungus that drinks shadow. Alchemists prize it; everyone else avoids it.

Name: IronwoodBough
Description: Wood with the temper of steel. Blades made from it hold a killing edge.

Name: DuskironOre
Description: Ore that only surfaces where the light fails.

Name: FeywoodBranch
Description: Living wood from the deep courts. It hums faintly in strong hands.

Name: Moonstone
Description: A pale stone that remembers moonlight even underground.

Name: Wispsilk
Description: Thread spun from spent wisps. Lighter than breath and stronger than sinew.

Name: StormheartCrystal
Description: A crystal grown in the crown of the realm where the sky never settles.

Name: GodboneSliver
Description: A shard pried from an empowered guardian. Only altar bosses carry them.

Name: WildGodIchor
Description: Luminous blood of the realm's mightiest children. Drops only at the end of the path.

Name: ManalithShard
Description: Crystallized excess mana. Feeds the Reliquary Shard's essences.

Name: OakheartSword
Description: A humble first blade. Everyone's story starts somewhere.

Name: OakheartShivs
Description: Twin carving knives that turned out to be better at other work.

Name: OakheartStaff
Description: A walking stick that learned to listen to mana.

Name: IronwoodBlade
Description: An edge that bites armor and keeps its temper.

Name: IronwoodShivs
Description: Paired blades balanced for fast hands.

Name: IronwoodStaff
Description: Duskiron banding lets it channel far more than it should.

Name: IronwoodHelm
Description: A helm carved whole from a single bough.

Name: IronwoodCuirass
Description: Layered plates of tempered wood.

Name: IronwoodGreaves
Description: Heavy but the weight rides well.

Name: IronwoodGauntlets
Description: Knuckled gauntlets that never splinter.

Name: FeywoodBlade
Description: The blade moves a half-beat before you do.

Name: FeywoodShivs
Description: They want to be thrown. Resist.

Name: FeywoodStaff
Description: Still growing leaves in the dark.

Name: FeywoodCirclet
Description: A crown of living branches.

Name: FeywoodVest
Description: Bark that bends like cloth and stops like steel.

Name: FeywoodStriders
Description: The ground softens under every step.

Name: FeywoodGrips
Description: Warm to the touch and quick on the draw.

Name: GodboneEdge
Description: Forged from the guardians of the path. It remembers being worshipped.

Name: GodboneFangs
Description: Twin fangs that drink the light around them.

Name: GodboneScepter
Description: Mana pours through it like blood through a living heart.

Name: GodboneCrown
Description: Heavy is the head. Heavier is what it survived.

Name: GodbonePlate
Description: Ribs of a fallen god shaped to guard a smaller heart.

Name: GodboneLegplates
Description: Each step lands like a promise.

Name: GodboneHandguards
Description: Hands steady enough to end the realm's last argument.

Name: GloomcapDraught
Description: A bitter draught that knits flesh mid-fight. Brewed at base camp; drunk on the run.
